query: SELECT user_id, full_name, email, role FROM peppr_users WHERE role IN ('SUPER_ADMIN','ADMIN') AND email NOT LIKE 'vitest%' LIMIT 5; SELECT ti.template_id, COUNT(*) as item_count FROM peppr_template_items ti GROUP BY ti.template_id;
